programme.desc: In Lancing, Gloria and Tom are battling over whether to stay put or move on from their Victorian semi by the sea. With three young children, only three bedrooms and a tricky layout, Glorias desperate to sell up and move somewhere bigger.

programme.title: The Somme 1916
programme.desc: Historian Peter Barton concentrates on the second phase of the battle from the middle of July to the middle of September 1916. Barton reveals how an allied advance on objectives which should have lasted days and weeks took months, and resulted in yet more carnage on the Somme battlefield. Whilst British tactics were unvarying, that of their German enemy evolved using the changing landscape of the battlefield.

programme.title: The Lafayette Escadrille
programme.desc: The squadron sees victory and loss as it serves as escorts on a bombing raid in Germany; Bloody April; the Lafayette Escadrille is absorbed into the fledgling American Air Service; at the wars end, William Thaw is made a Lt. Colonel.

programme.title: A Doctors Sword
programme.desc: Niki, the daughter of WWII survivor Dr Aidan MacCarthy, travels to Japan in order to learn more about the sword that her father brought home after his experiences as a prisoner of war.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Mac, Desi and Russ go undercover during an Indian wedding to protect a princess. (S5, ep 12).

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: The cool crime drama kicks off its second season with an innocent McGarrett behind bars. Terry OQuinn, of Lost fame, guest stars. (S2, ep 1).

programme.desc: As armed gunmen storm the set of a show that promotes conspiracy theories, the team races to prevent an escalating hostage situation on live TV. (S5, ep 6).

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: In Broad Daylight. When Holly Cantrell never returns home after work, her three sons are distraught. But Holly harboured a web of secrets that may have led to her disappearance. S9, Ep9.

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: So Close To Home. Two years after Ali Lowizter vanishes, police receive a tip that she may have been trafficked. The search turns into a rescue mission but will it bring Ali home? S9, Ep10.

programme.title: Diabolical
programme.desc: Mother Of All Lies. In 2015, detective Scott Sanderson uncovered a harrowing case involving a missing mother and her baby. The disturbing truth shatters everyone involved. S2, Ep3.

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: At 700 pounds, Ontreon has managed to keep going thanks to his faith in God, and hes training to become a minister. But if he cant find a way to believe in himself, hell never be able to stop eating.

programme.title: Animal Cops
programme.desc: Witness an extraordinary case of deliberate cruelty when a young cat is brought into the shelter with its paws missing.

programme.title: Helicopter ER

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek makes his way to Blackpool to pick up what will be the highest priced item at the next auction. But, unfortunately the 1970s Aston Martin DBS needs a tow to the local garage.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Over the years, Derek has learnt to always expect the unexpected. So when Call the Midwife star, Cliff Parisi, drops off his Bedford CA campervan, its just another day at the office.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Allied forces stumble across a sprawling complex in the French countryside with bunkers fit for the Fuhrer.

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: Looking at some incredible tales from war, including Churchills plan to create a giant ice ship, ghost planes that fly themselves and a Nazi treasure hunt for the Amber Room.

programme.desc: A toy company develops action-figure soldiers whose realistic fighting capabilities cause mayhem for a toy-shop owner and his family. Unaware of their military prowess, the shop keeper takes delivery of the soldiers, who break free from their packaging to attack their Gorgonite enemies. When the Gorgonites communicate with the shop keepers son, the humans find themselves under siege.

programme.title: Spy Kids 3

Our hero must save his sister, as they battle it out against lifelike 3-D monsters, completing each progressively harder level and ultimately trying to save the youth of the world.

programme.title: Dont Tell Mom The Babysitters De

programme.title: National Lampoons Animal House
programme.desc: The worst frat house on campus fights back against the fiendish Dean Wormer in the original gross-out comedy. John Belushi stars. Strong languagesex. (1978)(102 mins).

programme.title: I Love You, Man
programme.desc: Successful real-estate man Peter Klaven has it all: a great job, a beautiful home and a loving wife-to-be. Unfortunately, due to his devotion to both his work and fiancu00e9e Zooey, Peter has failed to make any friends. With his wedding fast approaching, the pressure is on to find a best man and so Peter embarks on several desperate attempts to find a best buddy.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Jason Bourne is living in India when he is framed by Russian agent Kirill for the theft of millions from the CIA. Kirill begins to pursue Bourne, intending to assassinate him, but while Bourne and his girlfriend, Marie, are on the run, a shot meant for him kills her instead. Vowing revenge, Bourne sets out to prove his innocence and bring the culprits to justice, but he has to evade CIA head Pamela Landry, who is convinced he is guilty.

programme.title: The Secret Kingdom
programme.desc: Twelve-year-old Peter and his sister Verity are whisked off to the underground kingdom of the pangolins, where a prophecy has declared that Peter is the king and must go on a quest to save the realm from the mysterious `Shroud.

programme.title: Arthurs Whisky
programme.desc: Three elderly ladies drink a whisky which makes them younger.

programme.title: The Blair Witch Project
programme.desc: Three student film-makers, Heather Donahue, Joshua Leonard and Mike Williams, set off into the woods near Burkitsville, Maryland, in search of the truth behind the legends of the Blair Witch. They never returned but, a year later, their footage was found.

programme.title: The Purge
programme.desc: One night per year, the government sanctions a 12-hour period in which citizens can commit any crime they wish -- including murder -- without fear of punishment or imprisonment. Leo, a sergeant who lost his son, plans a vigilante mission of revenge during the mayhem. However, instead of a death-dealing avenger, he becomes the unexpected protector of four innocent strangers who desperately need his help if they are to survive the night.

programme.title: Haywire
programme.desc: A covert operations soldier is sent on a mission to Dublin. When the operation goes wrong and she finds out that shes been double-crossed, she uses her skills to escape an international manhunt and make it back to the United States safely.

programme.title: Reindeer Games
programme.desc: An ex-cons plan to pose as his late cellmate backfires when he is roped into a casino heist on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Killer in My Village
programme.desc: The story behind the murders of 12-year-old Alice, her 18-year-old sister Xing, and their parents Jifeng and Ge, killed when businessman Anxiang Du targeted their Northampton home in 2011.

programme.title: Worlds Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: A look at the life of the American serial killer Daniel Lee Siebert, who received a death sentence for three murders but confessed to claiming the lives of many more vulnerable victims.

programme.desc: A case that shocked Jersey to its core, the disappearance of Nicholas and Elizabeth Newall from their home in 1987 would lead to a murder mystery of unimaginable consequences for their family.

programme.title: The Assassination Bureau
programme.desc: In 1906, a secret international club eliminates those they deem unworthy. Their leader, in an attempt to rejuvenate the group, challenges his assassins to target him, while he in turn will attempt to assassinate them. The scene is set for a cat-and-mouse chase across Europe, which is further complicated by the presence of a beautiful female reporter.

programme.desc: Mistress Hatch manages to fool Lord Brock and Father Oates escapes with a message but encounters Black Arrow.

programme.desc: Lighting expert Jolene is challenged to restore an unusual Empire chandelier. James works on a Seeburg jukebox to bring back the music, and Ann-Marie is handed a damaged book to restore.

Kite Master 2023
programme.desc: Welcome to the final episode of Kite Masters for 2023. Itu2019s the series that flies you around the world, together with some of the very best athletes from one of the most exciting, fast, extreme and stylish sports: Kiteboarding. For some, kiteboarding is just a hobby, for others, its a performance piece, to some itu2019s freedom, but for many itu2019s life. Join us this year, to share the experience with some of the most passionate athletes of the sport - and live the dream of the Kiteboarder! In our preceding episode, we took a journey to Italy, where the swiftest kiteboarders were gearing up to unfurl their kites in the picturesque Cagliari, located in the southern region of Sardinia, for the Kite.

programme.title: FEI Ride 2023
programme.desc: This month, Ride from FEI Originals presented by Longines has a regal feel. We plaud the u201cPrinces of Peaceu201d helping troubled youngsters overcome their hang-ups through the art of horsemanship at Tuff Therapeutic Riding programme in Canada. Weu2019re mesmerised by the festive Musical Drive performed by the Kingu2019s Troop Royal Horse Artillery at Londonu2019s International Horse Show, and marvel at the majesty of the Lusitanos still working the land in Portugal.n.

programme.title: Rubble and Crew
programme.desc: The pups are starstruck when their favorite TV renovation star, Hank Hammer, comes to see them at work. Capn Turbot is bringing Mayor Greatway a big surprise.

programme.title: Blaze And The Monster Machines
programme.desc: When a bunch of adorable critters called Boingies get lost in Axle City, its up to Blaze and AJ to gather them up and get them home safe and sound.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Everest, the Turbots and a Space Rock get trapped in a cave. Mayor Goodway goes missing and Mayor Humdinger causes havoc in Adventure Bay.

programme.title: Rubble and Crew
programme.desc: After uncovering dinosaur bones, the pups decide to build a dinosaur museum.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George take a bin of vegetable peelings to Grandpa Pigs compost heap - worms turn the peelings into compost and Granny and Grandpa use it to help plants grow.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Richard Rabbit comes to play with George, while Suzy Sheep comes to play with Peppa. The little boys dont want to play the same games as Peppa and Suzy.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Fun Run: Daddy Pig struggled to run a race to raise money to fix the school roof, but finds it far easier when a wasp is chasing him.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig hangs his clean football shirt out to dry, but Peppa, George and Mummy splash it with mud, so they put it in the wash - but Peppa puts her red dress in.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George go on a boat trip with Grandpa Pig, but they must send for help when their boat runs aground. Polly Parrot fetches Granny Pig and Grandad Dog, who rescues them.

programme.title: Blues Clues and You
programme.desc: Its a prehistoric game of Blues Clues when a mysterious dinosaur egg falls out of the skidoo frame and starts to hatch! We figure out what kind of dinosaur it is.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: The Casagrandes prepare Lalo for his big audition to be Phoebe Powers new canine sidekick! With the adults out for the night, Bobby and Carlota take turns watching the kids - and going to a party.

programme.title: Big Nate
programme.desc: A local legend comes to life as Nate and friends prepare for an epic Halloween. But Nates awesome plans may be foiled as a mysterious presence stalks the students.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Cecil shows Patrick his mustache collection. The Star family brings a mandrake root into their home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton goes to jail, but the secret formula is taken as evidence! Sandy struggles to build a ship-in-a-bottle before a big contest.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Gary is given a set of limbs to keep up with SpongeBob, but soon makes his owner look sluggish by comparison.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton poses as a wish-granting genie to get the secret formula. Mr. Krabs new soup is a hit, until some heat-loving hippies move into the soup vat.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: Sergio enlists Adelaides help to become a gentleman in order to win Priscilla back.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and her primos try to win Maria a trip around the world. When Carlota fails at hair cutting, she trains with the master barber himself - CJ.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid help Casey run his family food truck... at the Yoon Kwon concert! Sergio is in for a treat when a group of baby birds think hes their mama.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: When they find a treasure map, the Casagrandes go on a wild search for Pancho Villas gold. Frida and Carlos go on a fancy plane ride, but Carl and CJ try to sneak on for an adventure of their own.

Kite Master 2023
programme.desc: Welcome to the final episode of Kite Masters for 2023. Itu2019s the series that flies you around the world, together with some of the very best athletes from one of the most exciting, fast, extreme and stylish sports: Kiteboarding. For some, kiteboarding is just a hobby, for others, its a performance piece, to some itu2019s freedom, but for many itu2019s life. Join us this year, to share the experience with some of the most passionate athletes of the sport - and live the dream of the Kiteboarder! In our preceding episode, we took a journey to Italy, where the swiftest kiteboarders were gearing up to unfurl their kites in the picturesque Cagliari, located in the southern region of Sardinia, for the Kite.

programme.title: FEI Ride 2023
programme.desc: This month, Ride from FEI Originals presented by Longines has a regal feel. We plaud the u201cPrinces of Peaceu201d helping troubled youngsters overcome their hang-ups through the art of horsemanship at Tuff Therapeutic Riding programme in Canada. Weu2019re mesmerised by the festive Musical Drive performed by the Kingu2019s Troop Royal Horse Artillery at Londonu2019s International Horse Show, and marvel at the majesty of the Lusitanos still working the land in Portugal.n.

Kite Master 2023
programme.desc: Welcome to the final episode of Kite Masters for 2023. Itu2019s the series that flies you around the world, together with some of the very best athletes from one of the most exciting, fast, extreme and stylish sports: Kiteboarding. For some, kiteboarding is just a hobby, for others, its a performance piece, to some itu2019s freedom, but for many itu2019s life. Join us this year, to share the experience with some of the most passionate athletes of the sport - and live the dream of the Kiteboarder! In our preceding episode, we took a journey to Italy, where the swiftest kiteboarders were gearing up to unfurl their kites in the picturesque Cagliari, located in the southern region of Sardinia, for the Kite.

programme.title: FEI Ride 2023
programme.desc: This month, Ride from FEI Originals presented by Longines has a regal feel. We plaud the u201cPrinces of Peaceu201d helping troubled youngsters overcome their hang-ups through the art of horsemanship at Tuff Therapeutic Riding programme in Canada. Weu2019re mesmerised by the festive Musical Drive performed by the Kingu2019s Troop Royal Horse Artillery at Londonu2019s International Horse Show, and marvel at the majesty of the Lusitanos still working the land in Portugal.n.

programme.title: GP Gran Bretagna
programme.desc: Edizione n.74. 20 piloti e un solo obiettivo: diventare il nuovo campione del mondo! Verstappen in pole position. TC: Vanzini-Gene-Chinchero. Analisi e aggiornamenti con Bobbi e Sangiorgio.

programme.title: 4 amici al box
programme.desc: Una chiacchierata tra addetti ai lavori per fare un bilancio del 2023 e analizzare il momento della F1. Con Gunther Steiner, Mario Isola, Roberto Chinchero e Giorgio Piola.

programme.title: Giochi di squadra
programme.desc: Una sfida diversa da quella in pista: i due piloti della Ferrari, Charles Leclerc e Carlos Sainz, si mettono in gioco rispondendo a una serie di quiz. Con Federica Masolin e Davide Valsecchi.

programme.desc: Intervista di Mara Sangiorgio al papa del campione del mondo, luomo che ha fatto crescere Super Max fino a diventare il numero 1.

programme.desc: GP Ungheria Gara - In un campionato gia molto breve e ridotto ulteriormente dalla cancellazione della prima tappa di Imola, non si puo sbagliare oltre. Urge andare a punti e in fretta. E vale per tutti.
